p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } = is_left_inverse_fn[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[X, Y](g, f)
not is_left_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g) or forall(x0: X) { g(f(x0)) = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: X) { not is_left_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g) or g(f(x0)) = x0 })
not forall(x0: X) { g(f(x0)) = x0 } or is_left_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g)
exists(k0: X) { g(f(k0)) != k0 } or is_left_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g)
let w0: X satisfy { g(f(w0)) != w0 }
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0) { x0(x1(x2)) = x2 } = is_right_inverse_fn[T1, T0](x0, x1) }[Y, X](f, g)
not is_right_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g) or forall(x0: Y) { f(g(x0)) = x0 } = true
(forall(x0: Y) { not is_right_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g) or f(g(x0)) = x0 })
not forall(x0: Y) { f(g(x0)) = x0 } or is_right_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g)
exists(k0: Y) { f(g(k0)) != k0 } or is_right_inverse_fn[X, Y](f, g)
let w0: Y satisfy { f(g(w0)) != w0 }
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1) { (is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) and is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = is_bijection_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](f)

goal: exists(k0: X) { s.contains(k0) and y = f(k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[Y, X](g, s, y)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[Y, X](g, s, y)
not forall(x0: Y) { x0 ∈ image = x0 ∈ pre } or pre = image
exists(k0: Y) { k0 ∈ image != k0 ∈ pre } or pre = image
exists(k0: Y) { k0 ∈ image != k0 ∈ pre }
let w0: Y satisfy { w0 ∈ pre != w0 ∈ image }

goal: set_image[X, Y](s, f) = set_preimage[Y, X](g, s)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Y](f, t, x)

goal: exists(k0: Y) { t.contains(k0) and x = g(k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Y](f, t, x)
not forall(x0: X) { x0 ∈ pre = x0 ∈ image } or image = pre
exists(k0: X) { k0 ∈ pre != k0 ∈ image } or image = pre
exists(k0: X) { k0 ∈ pre != k0 ∈ image }
let w0: X satisfy { w0 ∈ image != w0 ∈ pre }

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, t) = set_image[Y, X](t, g)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Y](f, t, g(y))
not forall(x0: Y) { not x0 ∈ t or x0 ∈ image } or t ⊂ image
exists(k0: Y) { k0 ∈ t and not k0 ∈ image } or t ⊂ image
exists(k0: Y) { k0 ∈ t and not k0 ∈ image }
let w0: Y satisfy { w0 ∈ t and not w0 ∈ image }
function(x0: Y) { not x0 ∈ t or x0 ∈ image }(w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1]) { not is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or set_image[T0, T1](set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1), x0) = x1 }[X, Y](f, t)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not is_homeomorphism[T0, T1](x0, x1) or is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](f, g)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1], x2: T0) { x2 ∈ set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0(x2) ∈ x1 }[X, Y](f, set_image[X, Y](s, f), x)

goal: exists(k0: X) { s.contains(k0) and f(x) = f(k0) }

p.c: not forall(x0: X) { not x0 ∈ pre or x0 ∈ s } or pre ⊂ s
exists(k0: X) { k0 ∈ pre and not k0 ∈ s } or pre ⊂ s
exists(k0: X) { k0 ∈ pre and not k0 ∈ s }
let w0: X satisfy { w0 ∈ pre and not w0 ∈ s }
function(x0: X) { not x0 ∈ pre or x0 ∈ s }(w0)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T0]) { not is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) or set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, set_image[T0, T1](x1, x0)) = x1 }[X, Y](f, s)
function[T0: TopologicalSpace, T1: TopologicalSpace](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0) { not is_homeomorphism[T0, T1](x0, x1) or is_injective_fn[T0, T1](x0) }[X, Y](f, g)

goal: set_image[X, Y](a, f).subset(set_image[X, Y](b, f)) = a.subset(b)

p.c: set_image[X, Y](a, f) ⊂ set_image[X, Y](b, f) != a ⊂ b

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, a).subset(set_preimage[X, Y](f, b)) = a.subset(b)

p.c: set_preimage[X, Y](f, a) ⊂ set_preimage[X, Y](f, b) != a ⊂ b
not is_homeomorphism[X, Y](f, g) or not Y.is_open(t) or X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, t))

goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, t.c) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, t).c

p.c: function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { T0.is_open(x0.c) = is_closed[T0](x0) }[X](set_preimage[X, Y](f, t))
not is_homeomorphism[X, Y](f, g) or not is_closed[Y](t) or is_closed[X](set_preimage[X, Y](f, t))
not is_homeomorphism[X, Y](f, g) or not X.is_open(s) or Y.is_open(set_image[X, Y](s, f))

goal: set_preimage[Y, X](g, s.c) = set_preimage[Y, X](g, s).c

p.c: function[T0: TopologicalSpace](x0: Set[T0]) { T0.is_open(x0.c) = is_closed[T0](x0) }[Y](set_preimage[Y, X](g, s))
not is_homeomorphism[X, Y](f, g) or not is_closed[X](s) or is_closed[Y](set_image[X, Y](s, f))
